/opt/rocm-7.2.0/lib/llvm/bin/clang++ -fPIC  -O3 -DNDEBUG -std=c++20 -fPIC -pthread -DHIP_LOG_LEVEL=4 --offload-arch=gfx906 -s --hip-link --rtlib=compiler-rt -unwindlib=libgcc -shared -Wl,-soname,libmetaphor_hip.so -o lib/libmetaphor_hip.so CMakeFiles/metaphor_hip.dir/src/hip/hip_library.cpp.o  -lamdhip64 -lhipblas -lhiprand -lhiptensor -lMIOpen -lhiprtc /opt/rocm-7.2.0/lib/libamdhip64.so.7.2.70200
